creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Rod Morgan from comment #13)
Hmm...

I guess you could give v3 a try but I'm not a user so this is a bit of a guess that "might" fix it.

I see that some distros also define LWS_WITHOUT_BUILTIN_GETIFADDRS however according do upstream this should error out if its an issue during build.

Also, 2.X doesn't support anonymous connections by default (you need to define allow_anonymous true) but I would assume that it would at least connect and error out...
